description: You are a logistics operations manager at QuickShip Fulfillment Inc. Your company has just leased a large open 200 m² building shell, which is already open in Sweet Home 3D. Convert this open floor plate into a functional e-commerce fulfillment warehouse. Build interior partition walls to enclose a supervisor office, a staff break room, and restrooms, while leaving the main floor open for logistics. Define named room zones or use text labels for at least 4 key areas (e.g., Receiving, Bulk Storage, Pick & Pack, Shipping, Office, Break Room). Furnish the warehouse with at least 10 storage racking units arranged in rows, at least 4 desks/tables for workstations, and at least 4 chairs. Equip the break room with a table, chairs, and
